storyInfo: Ashlock's knight friend makes a deal with the General Chamber of Commerce, but the price is his life. As fellow scions of noble houses fallen on hard times, Ashlock must find the answer, for him and for herself.

attributes.content: A beautiful lunge! The scion of Bolesław shows no mercy to his former comrade!
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: But his conservative style is no match for the roar of a gun. Ashlock Knight blocks the attack with her shield again and backs her opponent into a corner.
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: Bear in mind, you can place a bet on your favorite with just the push of a button!
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: Turn your fortunes around overnight—only in Kazimierz!
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: Now's your chance, Greynuty.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You stand before me because you've made a choice. Don't tell me you're regretting it now.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Think of it as doing a favor for a friend—
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Kill me.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Two weeks ago...
Get him! Strike the gap between his pauldrons and gauntlets... beautiful!
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Keep it down, Joey, everyone's staring.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Keep it down in a bar? I want to see the Infected take that noble down a notch!
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Uh... no offense, Greynuty, Arbat.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Ruger's been on a win streak. Looks like he was telling the truth in those interviews where he said he was using Arts to improve his fighting style.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: On the other hand, the only thing worth talking about the heir of Oz for is his sponsored power boots.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Checkmate.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Nice. Guess reading the papers every day really can do some good.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Sigh... You got me, Greynuty. That's more than the 'I played a bit when I was little' level.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I had a lot of cousins with too much free time.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: You might've had a chance, if you weren't too focused on saving your knight.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Can we actually act like we're in a bar?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: This isn't the first time they've played chess as a form of tactical training. You, on the other hand, need to reflect on how you let your opponent have his way with you in that last elimination match.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Hey, I wasn't trained from birth like you lot.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: All I wanted to do was to open a little shop in Kawalerielki. Getting infected wasn't part of the plan. Tourneys are fast money. I'll retire once I've made enough.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Excuse me. Are you Ashlock Knight?
Yes.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I'm with The Red Wine. We sent an inquiry to your temporary residence a few days ago, but it seems there was a small issue...
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: I've been very impressed with your performance, and I believe you have a serious chance to make some noise in the Major.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: The public would be very interested in your private life, outside of the arena.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: For example, this bar you frequent, your everyday training, and... the details of your exile from the Kaliskas.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: My life isn't nearly as colorful as you think it is.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I've heard that you bear a grudge against your family. A single headline can draw more eyes and increase your influence more effectively than the slim hopes of a Major title.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: Who doesn't love a good story, after all?
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: You can make up your own gossip, but today is my day off and I want to spend it playing chess with my friends.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Very well. Sorry to bother you.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: My, my, Grey turns down an interview from The Red Wine just for us!
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: A tragic infection, a split from the family, a journey to Kawalerielki all by herself... a sob story draws more attention than cannonfire.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: We don't fight on paper with ink, Joey. Looking for shortcuts will just make you lose sight of what really matters.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Arbat's right. I hate the hypocrites in my family, but I'm even less interested in using them to draw attention.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: The Red Wine just started a new column, interviewing noble-born competition knights, in order to get support and sponsorship from noble houses.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: I thought Arbat's family was even higher in status historically. Why didn't the reporter—
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Hey! What are you doing... *ahem* I mean, it was his loss for not recognizing you, Arbat.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: I'm glad to get to avoid a nosy reporter, and I give thanks to the proud and dignified House of Bolesław, which left neither money nor trouble to its descendants.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Let's get back to our game, Greynuty.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Careful with your armor. At this range, you'll catch yourself in the blast.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You have the advantage at range. I must think about how to deal with this problem.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You really don't talk in a match, do you?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: In that case...
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Not fast enough.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: My magazine... is empty.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I see there's no other choice but to make you recall 'old habits'.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I'm glad I'm not good enough to spar with Ashlock Knight, Robert.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: I know the feeling.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Don't bother us while we're training.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Even a blank's got plenty of power. That wall looks like it could collapse any moment now... again.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Ahem. I'll pay for the repairs.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...Once last week's tournament money is in my account.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: This can be repaired with some old bricks and synthetic glue. That's how I fixed up the family garden before it was put up as collateral. Won't cost too much.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: But we've got a little guest to deal with first, who seems to have been drawn by the sound of cannonfire.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: A-Ashlock Knight? I just wanted to ask if you might sign an autograph for me. I've watched all your tournaments...
attributes.name: Infected Girl

attributes.content: Well, listened to them on the radio... I don't mean to interrupt your training, maybe I should—
attributes.name: Infected Girl

attributes.content: It's no bother at all.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: What's your name?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Diane!
attributes.name: Infected Girl

attributes.content: Here's your autograph. Thank you for your support.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Is there anything else?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: *Sigh*...
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Why do you like the Ashlock Knight, Diane?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: B-Because cannons are so cool! I don't know why my friends keep saying that a knight should use a sword, when shields and cannons are so awesome!
attributes.name: Diane

attributes.content: Besides, she protected my mom and dad when those people in black attacked the settlement!
attributes.name: Diane

attributes.content: And, and... I'm short too.
attributes.name: Diane

attributes.content: Er...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I'm sure the Ashlock Knight would be happy to give you a spent shell, since you're such a fan.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Take it.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Feel free to find me if you ever want another autograph... just be careful not to get hurt by the training knights.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Thank you! I'll come again. Good luck in your next match!
attributes.name: Diane

attributes.content: Why do fans love this piece of wood?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Thanks, Arbat. You're good with children.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I get along well enough with my niece and nephew. Fortunately, they're my diehard fans, and they haven't been converted by you just yet.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You've got plenty of fans. They like the image of a gentle, classical knight.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: I'm sure I could get Master Bolesław to go easy on me if I begged.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: He won't.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Arbat goes all out in every match, to show respect to his opponent, and for his own convictions.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I appreciate the praise. And I'm looking forward to our match.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I won't hold back.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Why are you two making duel arrangements when we're supposed to be going to watch Robert's match?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: It's alright, all I'm doing is trying to survive.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Letter for Sir Arbat Bolesław.
attributes.name: Messenger

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Thanks for the autograph! I'll keep rooting for you!
attributes.name: Fan

attributes.content: Hey, is it just me, or has Arbat been acting a little weird lately?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: You're just jealous.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: You bet I am! How did he win so many fans in the span of a few matches?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Did you read the column? Amidst vulgar boasts of noble status, Arbat's interpretation of chivalry touches the spirit.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: But his convictions about family are not to the taste of most Kazimierzians.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Green with envy, are you, Rob?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: You've really been pushing yourself lately, Arbat.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Like you, I have my eye on the Major.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: An outstanding performance, Arbat Bolesław.
attributes.name: Noble Knight

attributes.content: You should come to the banquets more often. We thought no one would take up the mantle of Bolesław.
attributes.name: Noble Knight

attributes.content: Thank you, sir. I'm afraid I've been too busy with matters at home to attend banquets.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Have your butler pick up the invitation next time... ah, I apologize, I forgot that the Bolesławs no longer have any servants. I must trouble you to pick it up from my servant personally, then.
attributes.name: Noble Knight

attributes.content: ...Thank you for your understanding.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You're not angry?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: This sort of contempt is nothing.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Master Bolesław.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: Sorry, I have an appointment. See you later, friends.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: He's been doing a lot of invitationals. Hasn't trained with us for a while.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: That reporter's from The Red Wine. Don't tell me that Arbat...
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: Don't worry, he can take care of himself.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: He didn't tell us he was having trouble with the estate. We didn't know he was almost kicked out of his home along with his nephews until after the season.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Let's go get a drink! If Greynuty says he's fine, then he's fine. Maybe he's just tired.
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: I guess... it's not like we can do anything to help.
attributes.name: Robert

attributes.content: Could you stop being so negative...?
attributes.name: Joey

attributes.content: ...It's as agreed then, Master Bolesław. The contract is already in effect.
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: But you don't need me to tell you that the more important the match, the more attention people will pay, such as...
attributes.name: Reporter

attributes.content: I'm quite happy with the General Chamber of Commerce's conditions. I just need time to prepare.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You should leave your shield and cannon behind when you're eavesdropping, Greynuty.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I know you're looking for an explanation.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Joey could barge in at any time and punch that addled head of yours.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: It's obvious that you came alone. You didn't want them to worry.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: And because whatever choice you make, you'll never endanger your friends.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I appreciate your trust.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: But this also means you're going to do something stupid to yourself.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I'm suddenly reminded that I haven't invited a friend to Bolesław Manor yet, since my parents entrusted me with the family.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Will you be my first guest, Ashlock Knight?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: My father taught me how to use a sword here in this garden when I was little. He told me that the Bolesławs may not be rich, but our conviction will help us triumph over the wealthy and powerful who look down on us.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I became a competition knight to make ends meet after my parents passed. Since I was unable to pay the registration fee to qualify directly, I had to start with the qualifiers, which is how I met you and the others.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Robert didn't think you would really treat us as friends in the beginning. You were noble and uninfected.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I comforted myself with the vile thought that at least what I was facing was much easier than what Infected knights have to put up with.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: But the family's finances grew even more dire, and I could not ignore the burden that my parents had left me. I must revive this forgotten house of knights, and make people remember the name Bolesław.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Winning the championship is our common goal. I'll prove to the Kaliskas that I didn't bring shame on the family, and you can win the support of even more people.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: But I'm tired, Greynuty.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: All those matches have done less than a single article in the paper. This garden making it back into my hands is proof.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: The effect of an article is fleeting. You can't rely on them.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: True. Which is why I made a decision.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: The last round of the qualifiers, the duel between you and I—
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: End my life there, Ashlock Knight.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Are you insane? You used your life to bargain with the General Chamber of Commerce?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: They can fulfill my dream of bringing glory to the Bolesławs.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You said we don't fight on paper. Who is the one who's lost sight of what really matters?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I received a notice of bankruptcy from the bank.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: There is no time. Fan support brings only brief consolation in the face of my family's inevitable decline.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: From a young age I developed the habit of reading the papers. Aside from details on my competitors, I also look for reports about myself, about House Bolesław.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Why care about empty fame?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Because my family treated me well. Because I identify with the heritage of chivalry. I didn't want my family's hopes and traditions to end with me, and for that, I was willing to suffer empty fame.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Think about it, Greynuty.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: The Kaliskas exiled you, and everyone thinks you hate your family. But was there not a single person in House Kaliska whom you respected, who treated you well?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Shield up, cannon up, bombard!
attributes.name: Grandmother

attributes.content: Greynuty, you're a good sprout.
attributes.name: Grandmother

attributes.content: Remember the motto of House Kaliska—
attributes.name: Grandmother

attributes.content: I want to do something for them.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I'm not afraid to die. I'm more afraid to see the headlines say, 'Historic Knightly House Bolesław Ends at Arbat.'
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Or that it would happen and go unnoticed by the papers.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Greynuty, my friend in knighthood, if it's by your hand that all this comes to an end...
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: It will be a true knightly duel, the cannon of Kaliska versus the sword of Bolesław.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: We will fight without regret and fulfill my final wish. Make me forget the scorn that all those nobles have shown the Bolesławs.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: My obituary will be the headline. By contract, House Bolesław will be able to hire servants and tutors again, so that my niece and nephew may see through their studies.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: When they come of age, they will walk the paths they chose for themselves with pride.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: The Bolesławs you're picturing are no different from the Kazimierzian nobles running around today. You could have changed it all.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Why are you still holding that cannon?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: If you can't answer the question, then you understand.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Even if you decline my challenge, I will continue to seek my curtain call in official competition.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You can't bargain your own life away...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I know. But this is the most valuable chip I have.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: That was powerful! How does Ashlock Knight wield her cumbersome shield so deftly, at her petite size?
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: Even the noble heir of classical swordplay seems to struggle with the skills of the Infected knight, honed over hundreds of underground matches!
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: The knight of Bolesław has fallen! Let us now congratulate—
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: Wait... do my eyes deceive me? The son of Bolesław rises again, carrying the knightly honor of his family on his shoulders!
attributes.name: Commentary

attributes.content: *Cough* Too light... far too light.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You're trying to avoid making the choice. Do you look down on my determination too, just like those incompetent nobles?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You know what I've fought for for so long, but you stand coldly between me and glory. I ask only one thing of you—
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Greynuty Kaliska! Fire your cannon!
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Let us see how the pioneers and masters of the southern woods once built the Kaliska fortune with gunpowder!
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.text: Do you see this shining badge, my dear Arbat? I leave the Bolesławs in your hands.

attributes.content: Let us see what injustice and scorn you had to fight through to reach the doors of the Major!
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.text: Are you sure about this, master, becoming a competition knight...? Pay no heed to the words of a distant relative, sir. The fate of the family is beyond what you or I can control.

attributes.content: *Pant* *pant... Let them see...
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: Let them see that there is still someone who remembers the pride of the knight amongst the Bolesławs... let all bear witness to his final blaze of glory, reigniting the fire of his family...
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: The silent knight raises her weapon and points it at her exhausted friend.
Yes, Greynuty... I knew you wouldn't be so cruel... you'll fulfill our promise... you've never let a friend down.
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: I'm empty.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Greynuty!
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You promised me that this would be a true duel between knights, each side giving their all for their unfulfilled dreams, holding nothing back, leaving no regrets.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: You should've noticed that I fired my last shell before you went down.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: What was going through your head when you swung at me? Ancient knightly ideals, or were you absorbed with your own noble sacrifice?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I know the answer.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: The gunnery skills my grandmother taught me do indeed belong to the Kaliskas, and that's not something that I can just toss away. I can, however, choose to aim my cannon at a different enemy.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: This is a conviction that belongs to me, not my family.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Greynuty...
attributes.name: Arbat

attributes.content: You are unable to continue fighting, Arbat. The winner is decided.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Say goodbye to your headline and your family's glory, then—
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Live for yourself.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.text: ...It was a clash between two nobles fallen on hard times, an elegy of chivalry! The scion of the Bolesławs and the pariah of Kaliska Forestry have come together in a magnificent display in the finals of the Major qualifiers! Bolesław showed no fear in the face of gunfire, while Ashlock Knight displayed a compassionate heart beneath her steely surface...

Bolesław fought his last duel prepared to make the ultimate sacrifice... figuratively speaking, of course. We are firm believers in the purity of competition and we will never promote violence and gore for the sake of drama.

It is with great regret that we report on the retirement of Sir Arbat Bolesław and the bankruptcy of his family. However, in a show of respect, several corporations from the General Chamber of Commerce have offered to fund repairs and renovations of Manor, and a stipend for Sir Arbat while he recuperates.
It is incontrovertible proof that a competition knight of Kawalerielki who pleases the audience is always duly rewarded.
\n\n—Special Commentator from The Red Wine, Representative of the General Chamber of Commerce

attributes.content: You've been staring at the headlines for a while. Are you gonna buy or not?
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Want the extra? You get the latest gossip here, not found anywhere else...
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: No, I'm visiting a sick man, and that's a little too strong for him.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I've heard there's a story behind both of those knights. One's family just went bankrupt, while the other is helping the Infected.
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: Things sure have changed. Since when did the nobles start caring about the Infected?
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: Does it make more sense for Infected to help Infected?
Fair enough...
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: Oh, sorry, didn't see you.
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: It's fine. A paper, please. I want to see what's new on the tournament circuit.
Here you go.
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: Pretty good business today. I should make a wager at the arena after I close up!
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor

attributes.content: But since when did we get so many Zalaks here in Kawalerielki?
attributes.name: Newspaper Vendor
